content.query:
SELECT 

lv.EmployeeLeaversID
,lv.EmployeeID
,lv.ReasonForLeaving
,lv.EmploymentEndDate as LeaveDate
,cal.CalendarYear as LeaveYear
,cal.CalendarMonth as LeaveMonth
,cal.FinancialYear as LeaveFY
--,case 
--    WHEN rc.contractID in (select contractID from [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_contract_dim] where ContractCode = 'PE' and IsActive = 'Y') THEN 'Perm'
--    ELSE 'Other'
--    END AS 'ContractType'
--,ec.description as ContractType

FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_leavers_dim] lv

LEFT JOIN [default].[dbo].[calendar_dim] cal 
ON cal.CalendarDate = lv.EmploymentEndDate

--LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_record_fact] rc 
--ON rc.EmployeeID = lv.EmployeeID
--AND rc.IsActive = 'Y'

--LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_contract_dim]  ec
--ON rc.contractID = ec.contractID
--AND ec.IsActive = 'Y'

WHERE lv.IsActive = 'Y'
